properties.description: Watermark-based incremental ingestion for the orders entity into Bronze Delta.

activities.name: LookupWatermark
activities.description: Read the last successful watermark for this entity.

source.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(last_value), CAST('1900-01-01T00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) AS last_watermark FROM bronze.pipeline_watermark WHERE entity_name = '@{pipeline().parameters.p_entity}'

activities.name: CopyIncrementalOrders
activities.description: Download rows where updated_at > last watermark from the source REST API.

activities.name: NotebookBronzeLoad
activities.description: Append landing CSV to bronze.orders_raw Delta table.

activities.name: UpdateWatermark
activities.description: Atomically update the watermark to the max updated_at from this batch.

scripts.text: MERGE INTO bronze.pipeline_watermark AS t USING (SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.p_entity}' AS entity_name, 'updated_at' AS watermark_col, MAX(updated_at) AS last_value, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS updated_at FROM bronze.orders_raw WHERE _ingest_date = '@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'yyyy-MM-dd')}') AS s ON t.entity_name = s.entity_name WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.last_value = s.last_value, t.updated_at = s.updated_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (pipeline_name, entity_name, watermark_col, last_value, updated_at) VALUES ('pl_bronze_orders_ingest', s.entity_name, s.watermark_col, s.last_value, s.updated_at)

activities.name: OnFailureAlert
activities.description: Log failure to pipeline_errors table and emit alert.
